description: For a major technology implementation project, an agent must draft a change management plan.

nodes.task_description: Identify key stakeholder groups that will be affected by the change (e.g., 'Sales Team', 'IT Department', 'Executives').

expected_outcome.value: Agent lists the relevant stakeholder groups.

nodes.task_description: Draft a communication plan outlining what messages need to be sent to which groups and when.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a structured communication plan.

nodes.task_description: Outline a training plan, including different training modules for different user groups.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a high-level training plan.
